title: Fern To Hemp
description: This texture pack replaces the large Fern with a hemp plant for a unique visual change. The models used in this pack are from the Nirvana mod
body:
# Fern To Hemp
is a lightweight resource pack that replaces the large crane model with a detailed better plant, giving your world a unique and alternative visual touch while still fitting naturally into the Minecraft aesthetic. The pack is designed to be simple, clean, and performance-friendly, making it suitable for both singleplayer and multiplayer use. The models used in this project are based on assets from the Nirvana mod by Team Galena and are used under the MIT License. Original mod: [nirvana](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nirvana). This resource pack itself is also licensed under the MIT License.
